name: Argus Merchant Services
description_short: Argus Merchant Services is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 3.5/5 with 125 Google reviews, reflecting solid customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Argus Merchant Services is a credit repair provider serving clients in New York, New York. With 125 Google reviews and a 3.5/5.0 rating, Argus Merchant Services has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Argus Merchant Services specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in New York, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Argus Merchant Services operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering Argus Merchant Services should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
